array.string:
LOG="$HOME/Library/Logs/downloads-new-files.log" STAMP="$HOME/.downloads_last_check"
# Ensure log directory exists mkdir -p "$(dirname "$LOG")"
NOW=$(date +%s) WINDOW=1800 # 30 minutes in seconds
if [ -f "$STAMP" ]; then LAST=$(cat "$STAMP") else LAST=$(( NOW - WINDOW )) fi
echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') — checking Downloads for files newer than $(date -r "$LAST" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" >> "$LOG"
NEW_FILES=$(find "$HOME/Downloads" -maxdepth 1 -newer "$STAMP" -not -name '.*' -print 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$NEW_FILES" ]; then echo "$NEW_FILES" | while IFS= read -r f; do echo " NEW: $(basename "$f")" >> "$LOG" done else echo " (no new files)" >> "$LOG" fi
# Update the timestamp file so the next run compares from now date +%s > "$STAMP"
